key_elements: Module docstring describing subscriptions app scope
Clear documentation of app responsibilities: plans, lifecycle, invoices, payments
Comprehensive admin patterns for 4 models (Plan, Subscription, Invoice, PlanFeature)
Fieldsets organization with collapse groups for advanced options
patterns: Template-style commented admin classes as documentation
List display with key decision fields (status, dates, amounts)

key_elements: Ready method with signal registration pattern
Comprehensive class docstring with feature overview
6 choice classes: SubscriptionStatus, InvoiceStatus, SubscriptionPaymentMethod, BillingPeriod, PlanTier, FeatureType
State machine documentation for SubscriptionStatus transitions
State machine documentation for InvoiceStatus workflow
Payment method integration notes (Iyzico for Turkish market)
Pricing information embedded in documentation (₺2K-₺8K+ pricing tiers)
patterns: Extensive docstrings with state transition diagrams

patterns_discovered.description: SubscriptionStatus and InvoiceStatus include comprehensive state transition documentation as docstring ASCII diagrams
patterns_discovered.significance: Establishes clear domain model understanding before implementation

patterns_discovered.description: Admin.py provides fully documented template code as comments showing expected implementation patterns
patterns_discovered.significance: Acts as development guidance for future model implementation

patterns_discovered.description: Admin patterns include multi-tenant filtering and organization-based queryset filtering
patterns_discovered.significance: Indicates SaaS architecture with organization-level tenancy

patterns_discovered.description: Admin queryset filtering excludes soft-deleted records (deleted_at__isnull=True)
patterns_discovered.significance: Indicates soft-delete pattern across subscription models

patterns_discovered.description: Iyzico payment gateway documented as primary payment method choice
patterns_discovered.significance: Indicates Turkish market focus, Iyzico is Turkey's leading payment provider

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Admin classes are templates, not active registrations
gotchas_discovered.description: admin.py contains comprehensive example patterns as comments but no actual @admin.register decorators
gotchas_discovered.impact: Future model implementation must include these admin registrations or models won't appear in Django admin
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Clear comments indicate this is intentional (awaiting model creation)

gotchas_discovered.description: Plan tier pricing (₺2K-₺8K+ monthly) is documented in FeatureType but should potentially be configurable
gotchas_discovered.impact: Pricing changes require code modification and redeploy
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Pricing should be moved to database-backed Plan model when created

gotchas_discovered.description: Signal imports commented out in apps.py ready() method
gotchas_discovered.impact: Subscription signals won't be registered until signals module is created and import uncommented
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Clear TODO comment indicates this is planned

gotchas_discovered.description: BillingPeriod enum exists but no indication which period is default for new subscriptions
gotchas_discovered.impact: Model implementation must establish default billing period logic
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Should be clarified during model creation phase

approach_outcome.summary: Created well-structured Django subscriptions app foundation with comprehensive choice enums and admin patterns
quality_indicators: Clear state machine documentation for complex enums

recommendations.recommendation: Create models.py with Plan, Subscription, Invoice, PlanFeature, PaymentMethod models
recommendations.rationale: Admin patterns are ready; models are the next logical step. Admin templates reference these models directly.

recommendations.recommendation: Implement subscription state machine transitions as a service or manager class
recommendations.rationale: SubscriptionStatus state transitions are complex; centralizing transition logic prevents errors

recommendations.recommendation: Create signals.py module with subscription lifecycle hooks
recommendations.rationale: Ready method has placeholder for signal imports; payment processing, invoice generation will need hooks

recommendations.recommendation: Move pricing from docstrings to Plan model or settings
recommendations.rationale: Current hardcoded pricing in docs is not maintainable; should be data-driven
Documentation mentions 14-day trial and 7-day grace period; these should be named constants

recommendations.recommendation: Create migrations directory and initial migration
recommendations.rationale: Standard Django app structure; placeholder for future model migrations
